top3.sql:
SELECT 
    (SELECT SUM(p.ViewCount) 
     FROM posts p 
     JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id 
     WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Mornington') 
    - 
    (SELECT SUM(p.ViewCount) 
     FROM posts p 
     JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id 
     WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Amos') AS view_count_difference

SELECT 
    (SELECT SUM(p.ViewCount) 
     FROM posts p 
     JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id 
     WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Mornington') 
    - 
    (SELECT SUM(p.ViewCount) 
     FROM posts p 
     JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id 
     WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Amos') AS view_count_difference

SELECT 
    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(p.ViewCount), 0) 
     FROM posts p 
     JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id 
     WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Mornington') 
    - 
    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(p.ViewCount), 0) 
     FROM posts p 
     JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id 
     WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Amos') AS view_count_difference

SELECT 
    (SELECT SUM(p.ViewCount) 
     FROM posts p 
     WHERE p.OwnerUserId IN (SELECT Id FROM users WHERE DisplayName = 'Mornington'))
    -
    (SELECT SUM(p.ViewCount) 
     FROM posts p 
     WHERE p.OwnerUserId IN (SELECT Id FROM users WHERE DisplayName = 'Amos')) 
    AS view_count_difference

SELECT 
    (SELECT SUM(p.ViewCount) 
     FROM posts p 
     JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id 
     WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Mornington') 
    - 
    (SELECT SUM(p.ViewCount) 
     FROM posts p 
     JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id 
     WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Amos') AS view_count_difference

SELECT 
    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(p.ViewCount), 0) 
     FROM posts p 
     JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id 
     WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Mornington') 
    - 
    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(p.ViewCount), 0) 
     FROM posts p 
     JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id 
     WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Amos') AS view_count_difference

SELECT 
    COALESCE(morn.ViewCount, 0) - COALESCE(amos.ViewCount, 0) AS view_count_difference
FROM 
    (SELECT SUM(p.ViewCount) AS ViewCount
     FROM posts p
     JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
     WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Mornington') morn,
    (SELECT SUM(p.ViewCount) AS ViewCount
     FROM posts p
     JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
     WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Amos') amos

final.sql:
SELECT 
    (SELECT SUM(p.ViewCount) 
     FROM posts p 
     JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id 
     WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Mornington') 
    - 
    (SELECT SUM(p.ViewCount) 
     FROM posts p 
     JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id 
     WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Amos') AS view_count_difference
